Annotation: In 2025, Labor won 94 seats, the highest #number of seats for a single party.

SenAnnotation: The Great Depression caused a lot of #political unrest, leading voters to support #the newly formed United Australia Party.
The Free Trade Party and #Protectionist Party performed #best in the very first election.
In the 1917 and 1919 elections, #the Nationalists won all but one seat.
HouseAnnotation:
Many of Labor's members left to join the Nationalists due to #
disagreements over conscription, allowing the Nationalists #to win over 70% of seats.

Annotation: In 1996, the Liberal-National Coalition #won 94 seats between its 4 parties.
